summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HubXUltra React Native Expo app. All required features are implemented and working correctly.
passed_tests: Expo Router structure correct (_layout.tsx, tabs, stack screens)
All dependencies installed and compatible (expo-font, updated versions)
BrightnessControl component with expo-brightness and gestures
PIN screen with SecureStore (getItemAsync, setItemAsync, deleteItemAsync)
All required assets present (icon, splash, adaptive-icon, etc.)
Configuration files complete (babel, metro, tailwind, etc.)
Package.json has all required dependencies and scripts
tsconfig.json properly extends expo/tsconfig.base with strict mode
success_percentage: Backend: 100%, Frontend: N/A (React Native mobile app)
